explanation: There is a soft blanket around the child's lower body that may pose a hazard to the face if the child was to kick that blanket and bring it over to their face. The child is also wearing mittens, which could make it more difficult to move the blanket away from the face if it shifts. There appears to be a sock above their head, but very small that it does not appear to pose a threat. All of these factors combined create a possible safety concern.
